samples.text: All cars are vehicles. All vehicles are machines. Are cars machines?
Every member of cars is among vehicles. Every member of vehicles is among machines. Does it follow that cars are machines?
All automobiles are motor vehicles. All motor vehicles are machines. Are automobiles machines?
machines include all vehicles. vehicles include all cars. Therefore, are cars machines?
All cars are vehicles. All vehicles are machines. This topic was discussed last week. Are cars machines?
